summary: Two-part issue: (a) asymmetric condition framing for conditions 3/4 — RESOLVED by EXP-271 (consistent '0/N met' headline + 'OPEN-001' sub-status replaces standalone 'pending'); (b) factual error at line 663/673 of docs/index.html — 'annular solar eclipse' for August 12, 2026 — STILL OPEN, fixed by EXP-277 P1 (find/replace 'annular solar eclipse' → 'total solar eclipse'). EXP-277 also adds regression-guard tests.
